description: A manager and employee unpack a missed documentation deadline.

background_log_entries.note: Flagged that requirements changed twice while drafting onboarding docs.
Rescheduled the docs review without confirming the new scope.
Reported being pulled into three urgent support escalations.

activity_signals.signal: Closed 12 support escalations during the documentation period
The documentation deadline has slipped twice without a scope reset

pre_conversation_briefing.participant_a_sees: The deadline matters, but the record shows scope and capacity changed. Start with curiosity about blockers before assigning blame.
pre_conversation_briefing.participant_b_sees: You raised risks early. Bring a concrete revised plan and ask for a clear priority decision when urgent work conflicts.

scripted_conversation.speaker: Rohan
scripted_conversation.message: The onboarding documentation missed its deadline again. I need to understand what happened.

scripted_conversation.speaker: Priya
scripted_conversation.message: I do too. The requirements changed, and I was also covering the support escalations.

scripted_conversation.speaker: Rohan
scripted_conversation.message: But we still needed it done. Why didn't you flag that it was at risk?

scripted_conversation.speaker: Priya
scripted_conversation.message: I mentioned the scope change in April, but I should have been clearer about the impact on the date.

scripted_conversation.speaker: Rohan
scripted_conversation.message: Okay. Let's reset it. What can you finish by Friday if we protect the time?

scripted_conversation.speaker: Priya
scripted_conversation.message: A complete first draft, if support coverage is reassigned for two afternoons.

follow_up.commitment: Rohan will protect two afternoons for Priya and Priya will deliver a first draft by Friday.
follow_up.success_note: The protected time was honored and the draft was delivered Friday.
follow_up.stalled_note: The protected work blocks or Friday draft appear unresolved. Can you confirm ownership and a revised date today?
